Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on WED-AUG-07-2013:
Paul Clifford, Esq. of California Anti-SLAPP Project [510.486.9123] appearing for NAPPSWatcher, petitioner / moving party;
Melinda Morton, Esq. of Procopio, Cory, Hargreaves & Savitch LLP [650.645.9020] appearing for AUTOMATTIC, INC., petitioner / moving party;
Samir J. Abdelnour, Esq. of Barg Coffin Lewis & Trapp LLP [415.228.5400] and Christopher A. Rycewicz, Esq. of Miller Nash LLP [503.224.5858] appearing for NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF PROFESSIONAL PROCESS SERVERS (NAPPS) appearing for respondent / opposing party.

HEARING - R U L I N G: Petitioners AUTOMATTIC, INC.'S and NAPPSWATCHER'S Petition to Quash Subpoena is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

RYCEWICZ, ESQ.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR RESPONDENT NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF PROFESSIONAL PROCESS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR2542.
